Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi

Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga

Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey

Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya

Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga

Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si

Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te

Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe

snippet.title: ENVY vs LOUD - VCT Americas Stage 1 - Week 1
snippet.description:
VCT Americas Stage 1 marks the next step in the race to Champions Shanghai, and the stakes could not be higher. Twelve teams, two groups, and only three spots on the line.

Group Alpha is fueled by one central clash. Brazil versus the Americas. LOUD, MIBR led by Aspas, and FURIA bring regional pride, while Leviatán and Cloud9 look to challenge them. G2 stands in the middle, ready to prove they still belong among the elite.Group Omega is shaped by pressure. NRG stand as the favorites, but KRÜ arrive ready to fight, and Envy reenters the spotlight with legendary names looking to prove they can still compete.

Only 3 teams will reach Masters London. Tune in to find out Americas representatives!

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: ExpressVPN, HP, Pulsar, Red Bull, Samsung, Secretlab, and Verizon.

snippet.title: The Kaiser | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The Kaiser is a cinematic short film that tells the untold story of Michael Schumacher’s rise — from his breakthrough debut in 1991 to the defining moments that shaped a legend. Shot with a bold, cinematic approach and driven by a commitment to authenticity, the film brings one of motorsport’s greatest stories to life in a way never seen before.

Created as a proof of concept for a future feature film, The Kaiser blends real historical events with immersive storytelling, capturing the intensity, pressure, and humanity behind the helmet.

The film stars Jivko Sirakov as Michael Schumacher, alongside Kristo Stoichkov as Ayrton Senna, Dimiter D. Marinov as Eddie Jordan, Raymond Steers as Willi Weber, and Viktoria Antonova as Corinna Schumacher.

The Kaiser is produced by Grey Universe, with VFX by Dexter Studios, and is supported by official partners including A1 and ERA Real Estate.

Follow the journey as we bring this story to the world.

Official Site: https://thekaiserfilm.com
Instagram: @thekaiser.film
TikTok: @the.kaiser.film

Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, involve editing together various pieces of film footage (from either one or multiple movies) to create a new trailer. These mashups are often made for films that don’t exist yet, or to alter the genre of an existing movie. As derivative works, as defined by the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, trailer mashups may be protected from copyright claims under the doctrine of fair use.
___________________________________________

Almost 20 years after redefining fashion on screen, “The Devil Wears Prada 2” is back and it’s bigger, sharper, and more glamorous than ever. The legendary Anne Hathaway returns alongside Meryl Streep, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci, bringing fans straight back into the high-stakes world of Runway. And yes if you’ve already been searching for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer, you’re definitely not alone. Anticipation for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer is already sky-high.

In “The Devil Wears Prada 2”, the story picks up with Andy, once again played by Anne Hathaway, as she finds herself drawn back into the orbit of Miranda Priestly. The fashion industry has changed, media has evolved, and Runway is fighting to stay relevant. Meanwhile, Emily no longer just an assistant is now a powerful executive holding the key to Runway’s future.

Buzz around “The Devil Wears Prada 2” continues to explode online, with fans eagerly refreshing pages in hopes of catching the first glimpse of The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer. The excitement is fueled not only by the return of its iconic cast but also by an impressive lineup of new faces, including Kenneth Branagh, Lucy Liu, and Justin Theroux.

Filmed across New York City and Milan, “The Devil Wears Prada 2” promises stunning visuals, real fashion moments, and behind-the-scenes access to the luxury world like never before. Add in special appearances from Donatella Versace and Lady Gaga, and it’s clear this sequel is aiming to outshine the original.

With its release set for May 1, 2026, “The Devil Wears Prada 2” is shaping up to be the fashion event of the year. Until then, fans will keep searching, rewatching, and waiting for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer the first true taste of what’s to come.

The legendary Anne Hathaway returns alongside Meryl Streep, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci, bringing fans straight back into the high-stakes world of Runway. And yes if you’ve already been searching for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer, you’re definitely not alone. Anticipation for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer is already sky-high.

In “The Devil Wears Prada 2”, the story picks up with Andy, once again played by Anne Hathaway, as she finds herself drawn back into the orbit of Miranda Priestly. The fashion industry has changed, media has evolved, and Runway is fighting to stay relevant. Meanwhile, Emily no longer just an assistant is now a powerful executive holding the key to Runway’s future.

Buzz around “The Devil Wears Prada 2” continues to explode online, with fans eagerly refreshing pages in hopes of catching the first glimpse of The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer. The excitement is fueled not only by the return of its iconic cast but also by an impressive lineup of new faces, including Kenneth Branagh, Lucy Liu, and Justin Theroux.

Filmed across New York City and Milan, “The Devil Wears Prada 2” promises stunning visuals, real fashion moments, and behind-the-scenes access to the luxury world like never before. Add in special appearances from Donatella Versace and Lady Gaga, and it’s clear this sequel is aiming to outshine the original.

With its release set for May 1, 2026, “The Devil Wears Prada 2” is shaping up to be the fashion event of the year. Until then, fans will keep searching, rewatching, and waiting for The Devil Wears Prada 2 trailer the first true taste of what’s to come.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: EXIT 8 - Final Trailer - In Select Theaters April 10
snippet.description: Based on the global hit eponymous video game created by KOTAKE CREATE. A man trapped in an endless sterile subway passageway sets out to find Exit 8. The rules of his quest are simple: do not overlook anything out of the ordinary. If you discover an anomaly, turn back immediately. If you don’t, carry on. Then leave from Exit 8. But even a single oversight will send him back to the beginning. Will he ever reach his goal and escape this infinite corridor?

CRÉDITS // GOAT

Production : Disques 7ième Ciel
Production exécutive / A&R : Steve Jolin

Interprété par : Souldia

Réalisation : Christophe Martin

Mastering : Christophe Martin

Chargé de projet : Samuel Ricard
Gérance : Steve Jolin, Josée Fréchette
Artwork : Étienne Bossé / Bosslab Design

----------

PAROLES // GOAT

Chaud chaud 
On fait les choses 
On va pas retarder le show  
J’suis au top 
Dans le miroir j’me suis regardé de haut 
Ça va chauffer dans la fosse 
Attrapez-moi si je saute 
Ils veulent s’asseoir sur le trône 
Ils veulent savoir c’est qui le GOAT

Concerts en supplémentaire
Un peu de respect c’est le minimum 
Carrière légendaire comme la barbichette des ZZ Top 
Toujours dans le truck 
J’ai l’impression que ça finit pas 
Y a peut-être un ops qui me check avec son périscope 
Hasta la vista la vie, j’suis dans un nouvel épisode 
Limoilou c’est l’épicentre et le vrai love est réciproque 
Merci à mes amis 
Et ça depuis deux décennies 
Si je réécris l’histoire j’essaie d’pas mourir avant l’épilogue 

QC city sur la fucking map 
Je suis resté debout comme un monument 
Depuis l’temps que j’voulais faire du rap 
J’ai posé ma signature sur les documents 
Je m’ennuie du temps où j’étais méconnu
Je suis toujours sur indica dominant 
L’histoire est sombre depuis le début 
Pour le croire il fallait le voir absolument 
Faut que je m’arrête 
Pour bien comprendre tout ce qui m’arrive 
Je ne prends jamais le temps de rembobiner la cassette 
À ce qui paraît 
On monte le cachet augmente le tarif 
Paraît que j’allais rien faire de ma vie 
On s’en reparle après 

Chaud chaud 
On fait les choses 
On va pas retarder le show  
J’suis au top 
Dans le miroir j’me suis regardé de haut 
Ça va chauffer dans la fosse 
Attrapez-moi si je saute 
Ils veulent s’asseoir sur le trône 
Ils veulent savoir c’est qui le GOAT

C’est le prince 
Tête de squelette 
Ou bien tu peux m’appeler Diablo 
Si c’était à refaire, je referais le même scénario 
Aucun regret 
J’ai bien failli y laisser la peau 
J’ai laissé que des hématomes 
J’ai trouvé mon Eldorado 
Holà
Gros accolade 
Que du partage et des collabos 
Encore un peu trop bonasse j’envoie des cartes postales de Monaco 
Tout ça c’est réel, immortalisé sur Polaroid 
La douleur de nos ruelles
Cicatrisée sur mon corazon

Guichet fermé 
Ça va dégénérer 
Comme un cri dans la nuit pour mes frères décédés
On a persévéré
Du mal à déléguer
J’finirai pas comme ton rappeur préféré 
J’fais la mula mes couplets se monétisent 
Mes albums c’est des recueils de poésie 
Je ne suis pas venu parler politique 
Les hommes racontent des mensonges mais pas les chiffres 
Toujours au bord de frôler la polémique
On est moins brillants quand on est colériques 
Je ne suis pas venu jouer la comédie 
Plus de fumée ça m’aide à mieux les tolérer 
Ils ont conseillé de consommer modéré 
Devil en l’air avant d’quitter le show 
Bientôt 25 ans de carrière 
Ils veulent encore savoir c’est qui le GOAT 

Chaud chaud 
On fait les choses 
On va pas retarder le show  
J’suis au top 
Dans le miroir j’me suis regardé de haut 
Ça va chauffer dans la fosse 
Attrapez-moi si je saute 
Ils veulent s’asseoir sur le trône 
Ils veulent savoir c’est qui le GOAT

----------

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
